full_text:
Ding Xian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Xian. Officer of the Commissariat in Zhuge Liang’s second campaign against Wei. Ding Xian may not have existed in history. Ding Xian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
